channel.title: Roswell on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Roswell on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO Reports and Atomic Sites
item.description:
Since 1947, US media has speculated about a link between UFO reports and atomic sites. Early in the Cold War, domestic UFO reports were taken seriously, with some media suggesting they were related to atomic energy transmutation, a claim later dismissed. By the 1990s, legends arose of UFOs interfering with missile tests and nuclear complexes. Statistical studies suggest UFO reports are more common near military or atomic sites, though experts argue this may be due to increased scrutiny of these areas.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_reports_and_atomic_sites
